title: AIRP Widget Manifest
description: Validation entry point for a standalone widget manifest file (e.g. widgets/<namespace>/<name>.json). A thin alias to the WidgetDef definition in airp-state-protocol.schema.json — that file is the single source of truth. Load both schemas together when validating (ajv: -s widget-manifest.schema.json -r airp-state-protocol.schema.json).
